## Summary

- Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran relevant local checks (for example: `bun run validate`, `zig build`, `bun run ci:search-regression`).

## Requirements and behavior impact checklist

- [ ] If this PR changes product requirements, user stories, command semantics, security behavior, or performance expectations, I updated `docs/acceptance-matrix.md`.
- [ ] If this PR changes user-facing behavior, I updated docs (`README.md`, usage docs, or both) to match.
- [ ] I reviewed requirement statuses (`done`/`partial`/`missing`) for impacted rows and adjusted CI command coverage notes where needed.
